DESC: This is PRE-SOLICITATION NOTICE   The US Department of Veteran Affairs Medical Center, Minneapolis, MN, hereinafter referred to as MVAHCS located at One Veterans Drive, Minneapolis, MN 55417.  The NAICS code assigned to this procurement will be 561320 with a size standard of $30.0 million.  The VA will award a firm, fixed price, commercial services contract.  Contract use will be limited to Minneapolis VA Health Care System only.  The solicitation will contain requirements for a 12-month base period contract, with four (4) 12-month option periods to renew.  Service will begin April 1, 2020 through March 31, 2021 for the base period.  The solicitation is scheduled to be issued on or about October 25, 2019 and will be issued via FedBizOpps Electronic Posting System at http://www.fedbizopps.gov.
LOCATION: Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center
OFFADD: Department of Veterans Affairs;NETWORK 23 CONTRACTING OFFICE;316 Robert Street N. STE. 506;St. Paul MN  55101
SUBJECT: Q--Opticians- Specialty Care - Mpls
